Handles Bluetooth bonding events for adding and removing host bondings.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that defines two functions related to Bluetooth bonding management. The functions [`bt_driver_handle_host_added_bonding`](<#bt_driver_handle_host_added_bonding>) and [`bt_driver_handle_host_removed_bonding`](<#bt_driver_handle_host_removed_bonding>) are declared to handle events when a Bluetooth bonding is added or removed, respectively.
